sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111944" key="foinikei/mwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φοινῑκ-είμων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, <sense id="n111944.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with garment of red,</tr_> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">φιλοκονίμων.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
